title: Quran, Sura 74: Al-Muddathir
description: Sura 74 (Al-Muddathir: The Cloaked One) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 74 (Al-Muddathir: The Cloaked One) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: O you who covers himself with a garment, arise and warn. And your Lord glorify. And your clothing purify.
